rules.name: A Perfect Ambush
rules.effect: Each time a GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities

rules.name: Ignores Cover
rules.effect: Weapons with **[IGNORES COVER]** in their profile are known as Ignores Cover weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, the target cannot have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

rules.name: Sustained Hits
rules.effect: Weapons with **[SUSTAINED HITS X]** in their profile are known as Sustained Hits weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, if a Critical Hit is rolled, that attack scores a number of additional hits on the target as denoted by ‘x’

stratagems.name: Coordinated Trap
stratagems.timing: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: Two GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (if this Stratagem is used in the Fight phase, that enemy unit must be within Engagement Range of both of your units). Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Select enemy unit in Engagement Range of both your units; your units can only target it until end of phase, +1 to Wound rolls.

stratagems.name: Primed and Readied
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.
stratagems.summary: Critical Hits on 5+ instead of 6 this phase.

stratagems.name: Tunnel Crawlers
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.summary: Set up unit anywhere more than 6" from enemy units.

stratagems.name: Lying in Wait
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS BATTLELINE unit from your army in Cult Ambush.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting your unit up using a Cult Ambush marker, set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of that Cult Ambush marker and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.summary: Set up unit anywhere within 6" of its Cult Ambush marker, not within Engagement Range of enemies.

stratagems.name: Return to the Shadows
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit from battlefield; place into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: A Deadly Snare
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: Roll D6: 2-4 = D3 mortal wounds; 5+ = 3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Tunnel Crawlers
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.summary: Set up unit anywhere more than 6" from enemy units.

enhancements.name: Prowling Agitant
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

enhancements.name: A Chink in Their Armour
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time the bearer is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: Our Time Is Nigh
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit declares a charge, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Assassination Edict
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll

rules.name: Unquestioning Fanaticism
rules.effect: For Each ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS, and NEOPHYTE HYBRID unit from your army, while one or more CHARACTER models are leading that unit, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for it. If that CHARACTER model is a MAGUS, PRIMUS, or ACOLYTE ICONWARD, that model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability while leading that unit.

rules.name: Feel No Pain
rules.effect: Some models have 'Feel No Pain x+' listed in their abilities. Each time a model with this ability suffers damage and so would lose a wound (including wounds lost due to mortal wounds), roll one D6: if the result is greater than or equal to the number denoted by 'x: that wound is ignored and is not lost. If a model has more than one Feel No Pain ability, you can only use one of those abilities each time that model suffers damage and so would lose a wound.

stratagems.name: Vengeance for the Martyr!
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.cond: One other GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, Hybrid Metamorphs or Neophyte Hybrids model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the destroyed model was a MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 vs target enemy unit (re-roll any Hit roll if destroyed model was MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD); lasts until end of battle.

stratagems.name: Frenzied Devotion
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models (excluding CHARACTERS) in your unit by 1 and those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.
stratagems.summary: +1 Attacks, +1 WS, [HAZARDOUS] on non-CHARACTER melee weapons.

stratagems.name: Tireless Fervour
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. When doing so, if it targets an enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more friendly CHARACTER units, you can re-roll the Charge roll.
stratagems.summary: Unit can charge after Advance or Fall Back; re-roll Charge if target in Engagement Range of friendly CHARACTER.

stratagems.name: Transcendent Celerity
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [ASSAULT] to unit's ranged weapons.

stratagems.name: The Downtrodden Rise
stratagems.timing: End of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army in Cult Ambush.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, you can set up your unit on the battlefield without using a Cult Ambush marker. When doing so, set up your unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.summary: Set up unit anywhere >6" from enemies, no Cult Ambush marker needed.

stratagems.name: The Path of Anguish
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.cond: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a move of up to D6", but it unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT), When doing so, models in your unit can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.summary: Move up to D6" toward closest enemy unit, can end in Engagement Range.

stratagems.name: Vengeance for the Martyr!
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.cond: One other GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, Hybrid Metamorphs or Neophyte Hybrids model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the destroyed model was a MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 vs target enemy unit (re-roll any Hit roll if destroyed model was MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD); lasts until end of battle.

enhancements.name: Gene-sire’s Reliquant
enhancements.effect: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. You can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Denunciator of Tyrants
enhancements.effect: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Deeds That Speak to the Masses
enhancements.effect: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. You start the battle with 2 additional Resurgence points.

enhancements.name: Incendiary Inspiration
enhancements.effect: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

rules.name: Hypermorphic Fury
rules.effect: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for **^^Aberrants^^**, **^^Biophagus^^** and **^^Purestrain Genestealers^^** units from your army. In addition, each time such a unit is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Evasive Vanguard
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers, before removing those markers from the battlefield.
stratagems.cond: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.effect: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.summary: Set up Cult Ambush marker more than 9" from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Saintly Paroxysm
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
stratagems.cond: That destroyed CHARACTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If that Character model is an ABOMINANT or PATRIARCH, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds instead.
stratagems.summary: Roll D6: 2+ inflicts D3 mortal wounds; 2D3 if target is ABOMINANT or PATRIARCH.

stratagems.name: Gene-twisted Muscle
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: +1 to Wound rolls vs MONSTER or VEHICLE.

stratagems.name: Hyper-metabolic Vigour
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". In addition, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends it as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.
stratagems.summary: Pile-in/Consolidation moves up to 6" instead of 3"; ignore closest model requirement.

stratagems.name: Stimulated Bio-surge
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if the closest eligible enemy unit is selected as one of the targets of that charge, add 1 to the Charge roll for each selected target of that charge (including the closest eligible enemy unit), to a maximum of +3.
stratagems.summary: Add 1 to Charge roll per target (max +3) if closest eligible enemy is among targets.

stratagems.name: Bio-horror Revelation
stratagems.timing: Start of your opponent's Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit within 9" of your unit is selected to shoot, it must take a Leadership test, subtracting 1 from the result. If that test is failed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: Enemy units within 9" must pass Leadership test (-1) when selected to shoot or suffer -1 to Hit rolls against your unit until end of phase.

enhancements.name: Predatory Instincts
enhancements.effect: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Infiltrators ability and, once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Biomorph Adaptation
enhancements.effect: ABOMINANT or PATRIARCH model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Mutagenic Regeneration
enhancements.effect: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. In each Command phase, one model in the bearer’s unit regains 1 lost wound.

enhancements.name: Alien Majesty
enhancements.effect: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).

rules.name: Rapid Takeover
rules.effect: While a GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE model from your army is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to its Objective Control characteristic. In addition, at the end of your Command phase, if one or more ATALAN JACKALS units from your army are within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Along Shadowed Trails
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.cond: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.effect: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.summary: Set up Cult Ambush marker more than 9" from all enemy units.

stratagems.name: Devoted Crew
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One GOLIATH ROCKGRINDER or GOLIATH TRUCK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.summary: -1 Damage on all incoming attacks.

stratagems.name: Close-range Shoot-out
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 18".
stratagems.summary: Grant [LETHAL HITS] to ranged weapons targeting enemies within 18".

stratagems.name: Rapid Feint
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS or ATALAN JACKALS unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to 6".

stratagems.name: Deft Manoeuvring
stratagems.timing: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS or ATALAN JACKALS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.
stratagems.summary: Grant 4+ invulnerable save to unit.

stratagems.name: Encircling the Prey
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit from battlefield; place into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Serpentine Tactics
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Cartographic Data-leech
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. While the bearer is embarked within a TRANSPORT, each time that TRANSPORT is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by that TRANSPORT as a result of the Firing Deck ability by 1.

enhancements.name: Starfall Shells
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Assault Commando
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

rules.name: Brood Brothers
rules.effect:
You can include **^^Astra Militarum^^** units in your army, even though they do not have the **^^Genestealer Cult^^** Faction keyword. The combined points cost of such units you can include in your army is:

- Incursion: Up to 500 pts
- Strike Force: Up to 1000 pts
- Onslaught: Up to 1500 pts

A **^^Genestealer Cult^^** model must be your Warlord, and **^^Astra Militarum^^** models from your army lose the Voice of Command ability if they have it. You cannot include units with any of the following keywords in your army using this rule: **^^Aircraft^^**; **^^Commisar^^**; **^^Epic Hero^^**; **^^Militarum Tempestus^^**; **^^Ogryn^^**; **^^Ratling^^**; **^^Tech-Priest Enginseer^^**; **^^Ministorum Priest^^**.

rules.name: Integrated Tactics
rules.effect: Each time an **^^Astra Militarum^^** unit from your army is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to that unit. If you do, until the end of the phase, models in that **^^Astra Militarum^^** unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and that enemy unit is caught in overlapping fire. While an enemy unit is caught in overlapping fire, each time a **^^Genestealer Cult^^** model from your army targets that enemy unit with a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: In the Shadow of Iron
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9” of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
stratagems.cond: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers. You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units and wholly within 6" of your unit.
stratagems.summary: Set up selected Cult Ambush marker more than 9" from enemies, within 6" of your unit.

stratagems.name: Regimental Reinforcements
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY REGIMENT unit from your army (excluding ARTILLERY and CHARACTER units) is destroyed.
stratagems.cond: That INFANTRY unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Roll one D6: on a 3+, place one Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed) and add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any [ONE SHOT] weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
stratagems.summary: Roll D6: on 3+, place Cult Ambush marker 9"+ from enemies; add destroyed unit back at Starting Strength with full wounds and [ONE SHOT] weapons unshot.

stratagems.name: Suppress and Overwhelm
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army has shot.
stratagems.cond: That ASTRA MILITARUM unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit cannot be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem and each time a GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army selects that enemy unit as a target of a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.
stratagems.summary: Selected enemy unit: cannot be targetted by Fire Overwatch; GENESTEALER CULTS units re-roll Charge rolls against it.

stratagems.name: Acceptable Losses
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army. Until the end of the phase, your unit can make ranged attacks that target that enemy unit. If it does, after it has resolved those attacks, roll one D6 for each of those GENESTEALER CULTS units: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: Ranged attacks on engaged enemy unit; each attacking GENESTEALER CULTS unit rolls D6 on 5+ inflicts D3+1 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Symbiotic Destruction
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASTRA MILITARUM and one GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that is visible to both of those selected units and within range of at least one ranged weapon from each of those units. Until the end of the phase, models in those units can only make attacks that target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target). When doing so, each time such a model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
stratagems.summary: Lock both units onto one visible target within range of both; re-roll Wound rolls of 1 for those units' attacks against it this phase.

stratagems.name: A Dark Network
stratagems.timing: Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves.
stratagems.cond: One ASTRA MILITARUM or GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 12" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to 6".

enhancements.name: Martial Espionage
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Once per turn, when a friendly ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit within 9" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Adaptive Reprisal
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Once per turn, you can target a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit within 9" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: The Hero Returned
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

enhancements.name: Firepoint Commander
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

rules.name: The Star Children's Blessings
rules.effect:
You can include TYRANIDS VANGUARD INVADER units (excluding AIRCRAFT, BROODLORD and GENESTEALERS units) in your army. The combined points cost of such units depends on your battle size:

■ Incursion: Up to 500 pts
■ Strike Force: Up to 1000 pts
■ Onslaught: Up to 1500 pts

No TYRANIDS models from your army can be your WARLORD.

rules.name: Psionic Parasitism
rules.effect:
At the end of your Movement phase, for each TYRANIDS SYNAPSE unit from your army, you can select one friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit (excluding PURESTRAIN GENESTEALER and PATRIARCH units) and one friendly TYRANIDS unit each within 9" of and visible to that SYNAPSE unit. If you do, that GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army suffers D3+1 mortal wounds and one model in the selected TYRANIDS unit regains up to that many lost wounds and until the start of your next Movement phase, each time a model in the selected TYRANIDS unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

TYRANIDS units from your army have the following ability:

Catalyst (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Hyperferocity
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If one or more friendly TYRANIDS units are within 6" of that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls of 1; re-roll all Wound rolls if friendly TYRANIDS within 6" of target.

stratagems.name: Psi Surge
stratagems.timing: Start of any phase.
stratagems.cond: One TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, increase the range of your unit’s Catalyst ability by 3".
stratagems.summary: Increase Catalyst ability range by 3" until next Command phase.

stratagems.name: Avenge the Star Children
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
stratagems.cond: One TYRANIDS CHARACTER unit from your army that was destroyed by that enemy unit this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a GENESTEALER CULTS model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: +1 Hit and +1 Wound rolls vs designated enemy unit for rest of battle.

stratagems.name: Divine Imperative
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more TYRANIDS units from your army. Until the end of the phase, each time your GENESTEALER CULTS unit declares a charge, if that enemy unit is one of the targets of that charge, add 1 to Charge rolls made for your unit and you can re-roll the Charge roll.
stratagems.summary: Add 1 to Charge rolls and re-roll Charge rolls against selected enemy unit in Engagement Range.

stratagems.name: Darting Attacks
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: Eligible to shoot and declare charges after Fall Back.

stratagems.name: Resistance Tunnels
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS or TYRANIDS unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit from battlefield; place into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Auger
enhancements.effect: TYRANIDS model only. Each time the bearer would regain one or more lost wounds from the Psionic Parasitism Detachment rule, it regains up to twice that number of lost wounds instead.

enhancements.name: Enraptured Damnation
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Tyrant
enhancements.effect: WINGED HIVE TYRANT model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Inhuman Integration
enhancements.effect: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 6" of one or more friendly TYRANIDS units.

rules.name: Forming Boarding Squads
rules.effect: Do not split ^^**Neophyte Hybrids**^^ into separate units in the Form Boarding Squads step.

rules.name: Mustering A Boarding Patrol
rules.effect:
You can include up to one of the following units:
- **^^Magus^^**
- **^^Primus^^**

You can include up to two of the following units (duplicates are not allowed):
- **^^Acolyte Iconward^^**
- **^^Clamavus^^**
- **^^Kelermorph^^**
- **^^Locus^^**
- **^^Sanctus^^**

You can include up to three of each of the following units:
- **^^Acolyte Hybrids with Autopistols^^** (5 or 10 models)
- **^^Neophyte Hybrids^^** (10 models)

You can include up to one of the following unit:
- **^^Acolyte Hybrids with Hand Flamers^^** (5 or 10 models)

rules.name: Rules Adaptions
rules.effect:
- **^^Genestealer Cults^^** units lose the Deep Strike ability.
- The **^^Acolyte Hybrids with Autopistols^^** unit loses the Claimed for the Cult ability.
- The **^^Acolyte Iconward^^** model loses the Summon the Cult ability.
- The **^^Neophyte Hybrids^^** unit loses the A Plan Generations in the Making ability.
- The **^^Primus^^** model loses the Decoys and Misdirection ability.

rules.name: Harassing Fire
rules.effect: At the end of your Shooting phase, you can select one **^^Genestealer Cults^^** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. If you do, that unit can attempt to operate one open Hatchway it is within 1" of (if there is one), and can then make a Normal move of up to 3" (regardless of whether it attempted to operate a Hatchway or not). Until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

rules.name: Insidious Ambushers
rules.effect:
Units from your army with the Cult Ambush ability lose that ability and **^^Genestealer Cults^^** units from your army gain this one.


In the Deploy Armies step, your opponent must set up their entire army before you set up any of your units. If both players have a rule that allows them to do this, both players set up their units normally.

stratagems.name: Planned Extraction
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: Unit can shoot after Fall Back this turn.

stratagems.name: Out of Hiding
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, at the start of the Reinforcements step.
stratagems.cond: One NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Deep Strike ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant Deep Strike to unit until end of phase.

stratagems.name: For the Brood
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more friendly GENESTEALER CULTS units. Until the end of the phase, your unit can make ranged attacks that target that enemy unit. If it does, after your unit has finished making those attacks, roll one D6 for each of those friendly units: on a 2-4, that friendly unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 5+, that friendly unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: Friendly GENESTEALER CULTS units in Engagement Range can make ranged attacks on selected enemy unit; each friendly unit rolls D6 after, suffering 1 mortal wound on 2-4 or 2 mortal wounds on 5+.

stratagems.name: Lurking Menace
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the attacking model is not within 3", subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Hit rolls from attacks made by models more than 3" away.

rules.effect:
You can include up to two of the following units (duplicates are not allowed):
- **^^Abominant^^**
- **^^Benefictus^^**
- **^^Biophagus^^**

You can include up to two of the following unit:
- **^^Aberrants^^** (5 or 10 models)

You can include up to one of the following unit:
- **^^Hybrid Metamorphs^^** (5 or 10 models)

rules.effect:
- **^^Genestealer Cults^^** units lose the Deep Strike ability.

rules.name: Blessed Visages
rules.effect: Each time an enemy unit declares a charge that targets one or more **^^Genestealer Cults^^** units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Leadership test. If failed, until the end of the turn, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Monstrous Momentum
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after a GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.cond: That GENESTEALER CULTS unit.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in your unit can end that move as close as possible to the nearest Hatchway instead of the nearest visible enemy unit. Your unit can then attempt to operate that Hatchway.
stratagems.summary: Unit not in Engagement Range: Consolidate toward nearest Hatchway instead of enemy; operate it.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Brutes
stratagems.timing: Your Movement or Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One ABOMINANT or ABERRANTS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase and has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when makinga Normal, Advance or Charge move, your unit can move through a single closed Hatchway as if it was open. When doing so, that Hatchway is opened and cannot be closed for the rest of the battle. This can allow that unit to declare a charge against enemy units that are not visible to it, but to do so those enemy units must be within 1" of that Hatchway and wholly on the opposite side of it from your unit.
stratagems.summary: Move through 1 closed Hatchway as if open (opens it permanently); can charge through it at enemies within 1" on far side.

stratagems.name: Soldiers of the Star Children
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase, just after a HYBRID METAMORPHS unit from your army is selected to perform the Set Overwatch Tactical Manoeuvre.
stratagems.cond: That HYBRID METAMORPHS unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker is Secured by your army.
stratagems.summary: Secure objective marker in range.

stratagems.name: Growing Dread
stratagems.timing: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit is selected to perform a Tactical Manoeuvre.
stratagems.cond: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that is within 9" of and visible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must take a Leadership test, subtracting 1 from the result: if failed, that enemy unit does not perform that Tactical Manoeuvre and it cannot perform anotherTactical Manoeuvre this turn (but can otherwise act normally).
stratagems.summary: Enemy unit takes Leadership test (-1); if failed, cannot perform Tactical Manoeuvres this turn.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.effect:
During the Declare Battle Formations step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can set it up in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases you can set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

If a unit with the Deep Strike ability arrives from Strategic Reserves, the controlling player can choose for that unit to be set up either using the rules for Strategic Reserves or using the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain
abilities.effect: Some models have 'Feel No Pain x+' listed in their abilities. Each time a model with this ability suffers damage and so would lose a wound (including wounds lost due to mortal wounds), roll one D6: if the result is greater than or equal to the number denoted by 'x: that wound is ignored and is not lost. If a model has more than one Feel No Pain ability, you can only use one of those abilities each time that model suffers damage and so would lose a wound.

abilities.name: Cult Ambush
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is **^^Genestealer Cults^^**, you start the battle with a number of Resurgence points, depending on the battle size, as shown below.

- Incursion: 6 Resurgence points
- Strike Force: 10 Resurgence points
- Onslaught: 14 Resurgence points

Each time a unit from your army is destroyed, if every model in that unit has this ability you can spend the relevant number of Resurgence points shown below based on that unit's Starting Strength.

**---Aberrants---**
5 models = 4 Resurgence Points
10 models = 8 Resurgence Points

**---Acolyte Hybrids with Autopistols, Acolyte Hybrids with Hand Flamers, Hybrid Metamorphs---**
5 models = 2 Resurgence Points
10 models = 4 Resurgence Points

**---Atalan Jackals---**
5 models = 2 Resurgence Points
10 models = 6 Resurgence Points

**---Neophyte Hybrids---**
10 models = 3 Resurgence Points
20 models = 6 Resurgence Points

**---Purestrain Genestealers---**
5 models = 2 Resurgence Points
10 models = 6 Resurgence Points

If you do:
- Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any **[ONE SHOT]** weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
- Place one Cult Ambush marker (see below) anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed).

**UNITS IN CULT AMBUSH**
Cult Ambush is a type of Strategic Reserves. Units in Cult Ambush cannot be targeted with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem, but can be set up on the battlefield using a Cult Ambush marker as described below, or by following the rules for Strategic Reserves in a subsequent turn.

**CULT AMBUSH MARKERS**
Use a circular 32mm diameter marker for Cult Ambush markers. If an enemy model (excluding **^^Aircraft^^**) ends any kind of move within 9" of a Cult Ambush marker you placed, that Cult Ambush marker is removed from the battlefield. At the end of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s next Movement phase, for each of your Cult Ambush markers still on the battlefield, you can select one unit from your army that is in Cult Ambush and set up that unit using that Cult Ambush marker. To do so, set that unit up on the battlefield more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units, with at least one model in that unit touching that Cult Ambush marker and all other models placed wholly within 3" of that Cult Ambush marker (that Cult Ambush marker is then removed from the battlefield).

Some units have ‘Scouts x"’ listed in their abilities. If every model in a unit has this ability, then at the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, it can make a Normal move of up to x", with the exception that, while making that move, the distance moved by each model in that unit can be greater than that model's Move characteristic, as long as it is not greater than x". 

DEDICATED TRANSPORT models can make use of any Scouts x" ability listed in their abilities, or a Scouts x" ability that a unit that starts the battle embarked within that DEDICATED TRANSPORT  model has (provided only models with this ability are embarked within that Dedicated Transport model), regardless of how that embarked unit gained this ability (e.g. listed in their abilities, conferred by an Enhancement or by an attached Character, etc.). 

A unit that moves using this ability must end that move more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If both players have units that can do this, the player who is taking the first turn moves their units first.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Cult Ambush
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is **^^Genestealer Cults^^**, you start the battle with a number of Resurgence points, depending on the battle size, as shown below.

- Incursion: 6 Resurgence points
- Strike Force: 10 Resurgence points
- Onslaught: 14 Resurgence points

Each time a unit from your army is destroyed, if every model in that unit has this ability you can spend the relevant number of Resurgence points shown below based on that unit's Starting Strength.

**---Aberrants---**
5 models = 4 Resurgence Points
10 models = 8 Resurgence Points

**---Acolyte Hybrids with Autopistols, Acolyte Hybrids with Hand Flamers, Hybrid Metamorphs---**
5 models = 2 Resurgence Points
10 models = 4 Resurgence Points

**---Atalan Jackals---**
5 models = 2 Resurgence Points
10 models = 6 Resurgence Points

**---Neophyte Hybrids---**
10 models = 3 Resurgence Points
20 models = 6 Resurgence Points

**---Purestrain Genestealers---**
5 models = 2 Resurgence Points
10 models = 6 Resurgence Points

If you do:
- Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any **[ONE SHOT]** weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
- Place one Cult Ambush marker (see below) anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed).

**UNITS IN CULT AMBUSH**
Cult Ambush is a type of Strategic Reserves. Units in Cult Ambush cannot be targeted with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem, but can be set up on the battlefield using a Cult Ambush marker as described below, or by following the rules for Strategic Reserves in a subsequent turn.

**CULT AMBUSH MARKERS**
Use a circular 32mm diameter marker for Cult Ambush markers. If an enemy model (excluding **^^Aircraft^^**) ends any kind of move within 9" of a Cult Ambush marker you placed, that Cult Ambush marker is removed from the battlefield. At the end of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s next Movement phase, for each of your Cult Ambush markers still on the battlefield, you can select one unit from your army that is in Cult Ambush and set up that unit using that Cult Ambush marker. To do so, set that unit up on the battlefield more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units, with at least one model in that unit touching that Cult Ambush marker and all other models placed wholly within 3" of that Cult Ambush marker (that Cult Ambush marker is then removed from the battlefield).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

During the Declare Battle Formations step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can set it up in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases you can set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

If a unit with the Deep Strike ability arrives from Strategic Reserves, the controlling player can choose for that unit to be set up either using the rules for Strategic Reserves or using the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Lone Operative
abilities.effect: Unless part of an Attached unit, this unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

abilities.name: Infiltrators
abilities.effect: During deployment, if every model in a unit has this ability, then when you set it up, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from the enemy deployment zone and all enemy models.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.effect: If every model in a unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack is made against it, subtract 1 from that attack’s Hit roll.

abilities.name: Creeping Shadow
abilities.effect: If this model is equipped with a cult sniper rifle, once per turn when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6"

abilities.name: Psychic Spoor
abilities.effect: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s prey. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its prey, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Cloaked Assassin
abilities.effect: If this model is equipped with a Sanctus Bio-dagger, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this model.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (5+)
abilities.effect: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Emplacement Platform
abilities.effect: Friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry**^^ models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the platform section of this **^^Fortification^^**.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.effect: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Fortification^^**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Defence Line
abilities.effect: While an **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** model has the Benefit of Cover as a result of this terrain feature, that model has a 4+ invulnerable save

abilities.name: Deployment
abilities.effect: When this model is set up, it will consist of 1 platform section, up to 5 shield sections, up to 2 broken shield sections and up to 2 end sections. All sections must be connected to each other to form a continuous defence line; the 2 broken shield sections can be placed either at the end of the defence line, or in the middle of it such that both are within ½" of each other (in this case, these 2 sections count as being connected to each other). All of the sections that have been set up are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

abilities.name: Fortification
abilities.effect:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more ^^**Fortifications**^^ from your army:
- That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
- Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise 1
abilities.effect: Some models have 'Deadly Demise x' listed in their abilities. When such a model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play (if such a model is a TRANSPORT, roll before any embarked models disembark). On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by 'x' (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

abilities.name: Mobile Hunter-killers
abilities.effect: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D6+2
abilities.effect: Some models have 'Deadly Demise x' listed in their abilities. When such a model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play (if such a model is a TRANSPORT, roll before any embarked models disembark). On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by 'x' (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

abilities.name: Rolling Fortress
abilities.effect: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an **^^Astra Militarum^^** model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Baneblade^^** model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

damaged.name: Damaged: 1-8 Wounds Remaining
damaged.effect: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Firing Deck 6
abilities.effect: Some **^^Transport^^** models have ‘Firing Deck x’ listed in their abilities. Each time such a model is selected to shoot in the Shooting phase, you can select up to ‘x’ models embarked within it whose units have not already shot this phase. Then, for each of those embarked models, you can select one ranged weapon that embarked model is equipped with (excluding weapons with the **[ONE SHOT]** ability). Until that **^^Transport^^** model has resolved all of its attacks, it counts as being equipped with all of the weapons you selected in this way, in addition to its other weapons. Until the end of the phase, those selected models’ units are not eligible to shoot.

abilities.effect: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s tremor cannon, the target unit and every other enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit within 3" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.effect: This model has a transport capacity of 26 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry models^^**. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

abilities.name: Earthshaker Rounds
abilities.effect: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Voice Of Command
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is **^^Astra Militarum^^**, **^^Officer^^** models with this ability can issue Orders. Each **^^Officer^^**'s datasheet will specify how many Orders it can issue and which units are eligible to receive those Orders. Each time an **^^Officer^^** model issues an Order, select one of the Orders below, then select one eligible friendly unit within 6" of that **^^Officer^^** model to issue it to. **^^Officer^^** models can issue Orders in your Command phase and at the end of a phase in which they disembarked from a **^^Transport^^** or were set up on the battlefield.

Until the start of your next Command phase, the unit you selected is affected by that Order. Unless otherwise stated, a unit can only be affected by one Order at a time (any Order subsequently issued to that unit replaces the current one). Orders cannot be issued to Battle-shocked units, and if a unit being affected by an Order becomes Battle-shocked, that Order ceases to affect that unit.


Only **^^Astra Militarum^^** models gain the benefit of an Order issued to their unit.

**MOVE! MOVE! MOVE!**
Add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

**FIX BAYONETS!**
Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**TAKE AIM!**
Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**FIRST RANK, FIRE! SECOND RANK, FIRE!**
Improve the Attacks characteristic of Rapid Fire weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**TAKE COVER!**
Improve the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1 (this cannot improve a model’s Save to better than 3+).

**DUTY AND HONOUR!**
Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

**FIX BAYONETS!**
Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**TAKE AIM!**
Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**FIRST RANK, FIRE! SECOND RANK, FIRE!**
Improve the Attacks characteristic of Rapid Fire weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**TAKE COVER!**
Improve the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1 (this cannot improve a model’s Save to better than 3+).

**DUTY AND HONOUR!**
Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1.

abilities.effect: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Feeder Tendrils
abilities.effect: Each time a melee attack made a model in this unit destroys an enemy **^^Character^^** model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Hyperstimulation
abilities.effect: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: Psychic Terror (Psychic)
abilities.effect: **^^Psyker^^** only. If one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield when you unleash the Shadow in the Warp, subtract 1 from the Battle-shock test each enemy unit on the battlefield must take as a result.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Crucible

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.effect:
During the Declare Battle Formations step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can set it up in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases you can set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

If a unit with the Deep Strike ability arrives from Strategic Reserves, the controlling player can choose for that unit to be set up either using the rules for Strategic Reserves or using the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.effect: If every model in a unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack is made against it, subtract 1 from that attack’s Hit roll.

abilities.name: Fights First
abilities.effect: Units with this ability that are eligible to fight do so in the Fights First step, provided every model in the unit has this ability.

abilities.name: Infiltrators
abilities.effect: During deployment, if every model in a unit has this ability, then when you set it up, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from the enemy deployment zone and all enemy models.

abilities.name: Lone Operative
abilities.effect: Unless part of an Attached unit, this unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

abilities.name: Shadow in the Warp
abilities.effect: If your Army Faction is **^^Tyranids^^**, once per battle, in either player’s Command phase, if one or more units from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When you do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take a Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit takes such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6" of one or more Synapse units from your army, subtract 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Synapse
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is **^^Tyranids^^**, while a **^^Tyranids^^** unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly **^^Synapse^^** models, that **^^Tyranids^^** unit is said to be within Synapse Range of that model and of your army. While a **^^Tyranids^^** unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army:

■ Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, take that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6.
■ Each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

DEDICATED TRANSPORT models can make use of any Scouts x" ability listed in their abilities, or a Scouts x" ability that a unit that starts the battle embarked within that DEDICATED TRANSPORT  model has (provided only models with this ability are embarked within that Dedicated Transport model), regardless of how that embarked unit gained this ability (e.g. listed in their abilities, conferred by an Enhancement or by an attached Character, etc.).

abilities.effect: A **^^Character^^** created using Crucible rules has the Crucible ability. Your army may include up to three units with the Crucible ability and these units cannot be given Enhancements.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.effect:
During the Declare Battle Formations step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can set it up in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases you can set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

If a unit with the Deep Strike ability arrives from Strategic Reserves, the controlling player can choose for that unit to be set up either using the rules for Strategic Reserves or using the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.effect: If every model in a unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack is made against it, subtract 1 from that attack’s Hit roll.

abilities.name: Scouts 9"
abilities.effect:
Some units have ‘Scouts x"’ listed in their abilities. If every model in a unit has this ability, then at the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, it can make a Normal move of up to x", with the exception that, while making that move, the distance moved by each model in that unit can be greater than that model's Move characteristic, as long as it is not greater than x". 

DEDICATED TRANSPORT models can make use of any Scouts x" ability listed in their abilities, or a Scouts x" ability that a unit that starts the battle embarked within that DEDICATED TRANSPORT  model has (provided only models with this ability are embarked within that Dedicated Transport model), regardless of how that embarked unit gained this ability (e.g. listed in their abilities, conferred by an Enhancement or by an attached Character, etc.). 

A unit that moves using this ability must end that move more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If both players have units that can do this, the player who is taking the first turn moves their units first.

abilities.effect: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model's prey. Each time this model makes an attack that targets it prey, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Shadow Killer
abilities.effect: If this model is no part of an Attached unit and if this model is equipped with no ranged weapons (excluding pistols), enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this model.

abilities.name: Spiritual Leader
abilities.effect: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^Genestealer Cults^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Twisted Science
abilities.effect: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise 1
abilities.effect: Some models have 'Deadly Demise x' listed in their abilities. When such a model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play (if such a model is a TRANSPORT, roll before any embarked models disembark). On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by 'x' (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

abilities.name: Convoy Escort Vehicle
abilities.effect: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Firing Deck 12
abilities.effect: Some **^^Transport^^** models have ‘Firing Deck x’ listed in their abilities. Each time such a model is selected to shoot in the Shooting phase, you can select up to ‘x’ models embarked within it whose units have not already shot this phase. Then, for each of those embarked models, you can select one ranged weapon that embarked model is equipped with (excluding weapons with the **[ONE SHOT]** ability). Until that **^^Transport^^** model has resolved all of its attacks, it counts as being equipped with all of the weapons you selected in this way, in addition to its other weapons. Until the end of the phase, those selected models’ units are not eligible to shoot.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.effect: Some models have 'Deadly Demise x' listed in their abilities. On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by 'x' (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

abilities.name: Rapid Strike Vehicle
abilities.effect: While one or more units are embarked within this model, unless this model is Battle‑shocked, add 1 to this model’s Objective Control characteristic for every 3 models (rounding down) embarked within it.

abilities.name: Transport
abilities.effect: Capacity: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** models. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

abilities.name: Synapse

■ Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, take that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6.
■ Each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Serpentine Fiend
abilities.effect: This model can move through terrain features, but cannot end a move within a wall, a floor, etc. This model can be set up or end a move on any floor level of **^^Ruins^^**, but if that level is not the ground floor, it can only do so if its base does not overhang the floor at that level.

abilities.name: Swallow Whole
abilities.effect: Each time an attack with this model’s gaping maw targets an **^^Infantry^^**, **^^Mounted^^** or **^^Beasts^^** unit, each successful unmodified Wound roll is a Critical Wound. Each time an **^^Infantry^^**, **^^Mounted^^** or **^^Beasts^^** model is destroyed as a result of an attack made by this model’s gaping maw, this model regains up to D3+2 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Subterranean Hunter
abilities.effect: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 6+
abilities.effect: Some models have 'Feel No Pain x+' listed in their abilities. Each time a model with this ability suffers damage and so would lose a wound (including wounds lost due to mortal wounds), roll one D6: if the result is greater than or equal to the number denoted by 'x: that wound is ignored and is not lost. abilities.name: Leader
abilities.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Voice Of Command
abilities.effect:
If your Army Faction is **^^Astra Militarum^^**, **^^Officer^^** models with this ability can issue Orders. Each **^^Officer^^**'s datasheet will specify how many Orders it can issue and which units are eligible to receive those Orders. Each time an **^^Officer^^** model issues an Order, select one of the Orders below, then select one eligible friendly unit within 6" of that **^^Officer^^** model to issue it to. **^^Officer^^** models can issue Orders in your Command phase and at the end of a phase in which they disembarked from a **^^Transport^^** or were set up on the battlefield.

Until the start of your next Command phase, the unit you selected is affected by that Order. Unless otherwise stated, a unit can only be affected by one Order at a time (any Order subsequently issued to that unit replaces the current one). Orders cannot be issued to Battle-shocked units, and if a unit being affected by an Order becomes Battle-shocked, that Order ceases to affect that unit.


Only **^^Astra Militarum^^** models gain the benefit of an Order issued to their unit.

**MOVE! MOVE! MOVE!**
Add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

**FIX BAYONETS!**
Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**TAKE AIM!**
Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**FIRST RANK, FIRE! SECOND RANK, FIRE!**
Improve the Attacks characteristic of Rapid Fire weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

**TAKE COVER!**
Improve the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1 (this cannot improve a model’s Save to better than 3+).

**DUTY AND HONOUR!**
Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1.
